heading: State taxation; lands of desert-land entryman
label: 455a State taxation; lands of desert-land entryman
text: The lands of any desert-land entryman located within an irrigation project constructed under the Reclamation Act and obtaining a water supply from such project, and for whose land water has been actually available for a period of four years, may likewise be taxed by the State or political subdivision thereof in which such lands are located.
notes: References in TextThe Reclamation Act, referred to in text, is identified in .section 455 of this title
